creative_concept: Two takes, one pocket: cold-open on two impact moves, rewind to the groove, then climb through arm sweeps and grounded isolations to a clean high-knee finish.

global_framing.background: Duplicate source frame, scale to cover 1080x1920, center-crop, heavy blur, darken and slightly desaturate.
global_framing.foreground_stage: Crop 288x360 at x=176,y=0; scale to 1080x1350; center at y=285. This 4:5-ish sharp window preserves the full-body choreography better than a hard 9:16 crop.
global_framing.foreground_impact: Crop 216x360 at x=212,y=0; scale to 1080x1800; place at y=60 for the two opening punches.
global_framing.safe_area: Text remains at x=90,y=120 in a 900x160 banner, clear of the dancer and typical bottom/right Instagram controls.

timeline.content: Fast leg lift and chest/arm accent; immediate motion hook.
Alternate-take torso fold and knee accent; confirms the two-take premise.
Controlled opening groove and small isolations; visual reset after the hook.
Hand-led phrase grows upward into a larger arm path.
Sweeping arm travel and an overhead reach begin the lift.
Broader reach from the alternate take, ending before the background passerby enters.
Deep wide stance with overhead arm arc; the clearest power peak.
Side-to-side release and head/shoulder accents keep momentum without repeating the peak.
High-knee rise and open-arm finish; end before the walk to camera.
timeline.transition_out: clean end on the last rendered frame

text_cues.style: white custom pixel lettering, charcoal translucent banner, lime left rule
same banner; disappears one frame before the second shot ends
same banner; three-frame text lead into the final take

source_audio_policy.reason: Both takes contain continuous, unidentified rehearsal playback with no rights clearance; the edit does not rely on speech.
source_audio_policy.preview_replacement: A generated 108 BPM two-tone metronome, faded at head and tail. No downloaded or commercial catalog audio is embedded.
source_audio_policy.instagram_finish: Replace the metronome with a user-confirmed Instagram library track using music-handoff.json; do not restore camera audio unless rights are confirmed.

render_reconstruction_note: Output and source frame ranges above are the exact 30 fps decoded-frame ranges represented in the rendered 534-frame preview. End frames are exclusive.
